meaning: adj.痛风的,易患痛风的,患了痛风的
examples: Method 1. Use uric acid to make rabbits' knee gouty arthritis.
The review did not concern osteoarthritis and acute gouty arthritis.
'Gouty toe' is characterized by swelling, redness, and stiffness and pain.
His son, the sickly Piero (the gouty), took over, though he had no serious experience in banking.
Medical suppression of an attack of gouty inflammation can decrease pain faster.
